revision.text:
{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=PasteToCommons |desc=<onlyinclude>Upload an image to Commons from anywhere on the site by pasting it</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js]] }}
If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. This is to allow easier [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia|uploading and sharing of screenshots of the site]].
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Nardog/PasteToCommons]]
revision.text:
{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=PasteToCommons |desc=<onlyinclude>Upload an image to Commons from anywhere on the site by pasting it</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js]] }}
If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. This is to allow easier [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia|uploading and sharing of screenshots of the site]].
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=PasteToCommons |desc=<onlyinclude>Upload an image to Commons from anywhere on the site by pasting it</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js]] }}
If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. This is to allow easier [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia|uploading and sharing of screenshots of the site]].
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

{{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=PasteToCommons |desc=<onlyinclude>Upload an image to Commons from anywhere on the site by pasting it</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js]] }}
If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. This is to allow easier [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia|uploading and sharing of screenshots of the site]].
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. ==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FPasteToCommons here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FPasteToCommons for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Tool warning}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=PasteToCommons |desc=<onlyinclude>Upload an image to Commons from anywhere on the site by pasting it</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js]] }}
If you paste an image by {{key press|Ctrl|V}} (or {{key press|Cmd|V}} or whatever depending on your OS) on any page on the site while this script is installed, a dialog will show up that allows you to upload it to [[Wikipedia:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]]. This is to allow easier [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia|uploading and sharing of screenshots of the site]].
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/PasteToCommons.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==Usage== The default values for the description are based on the instructions at [[Wikipedia:Screenshots of Wikipedia]] . You may override them in your common.js using the following syntax:
<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> window.pastetocommonsDefaults = { filename: 'en.wikipedia.org Page Name yyyy-mm-dd', description: 'Screenshot of the English Wikipedia', source: 'Screenshot', author: 'Wikipedia Authors, see the history of [[w:Page Name]]', license: '{{Wikipedia-screenshot|1=en}}' }; </syntaxhighlight>
==Caveats== The names of the site and the page on which you pasted the file will be published in the upload summary (separate from the filename/description).
This script employs hacks that may cease to work upon upstream code change.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}
